Name: Ending Theme
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Anby's Mindscape Cinema "Charging Field"
Desc2:
A card with Anby's face printed on it.
"What am I listening to? Uh, it's a really good song..."
"It's from the movie we watched together last time."
"...Hey, don't cry! You were crying in the movie, too. I think it's the same for you..."
